meta.title: Practical Data Science on AWS: Generative AI
meta.description:
Welcome! Join us for a live workshop where you can follow along with AWS instructors Antje and Chris as they share about Practical Data Science on AWS: Generative AI.

We will be taking questions during the event. Please submit your question or upvote others' here:
https://app.sli.do/event/mERNmkT3dGskssVEhsLCkK

Speakers
Antje Barth, Principal Developer Advocate, AI/ML at AWS
https://www.linkedin.com/in/antje-barth/

Chris Fregly, Principal Engineer, AI/ML at AWS
https://www.linkedin.com/in/cfregly/

Dr. Greg Loughnane, Head of Product & Curriculum at FourthBrain
https://www.linkedin.com/in/gregloughnane/

Let us know how we're doing? We will be giving out discount codes for a selected number of people who fill out the survey:
https://forms.gle/SvQigaNuZcqvKkg16

Want to learn more about Practical Data Science? Check out our course and start learning today! https://bit.ly/41jDlm9

Looking to connect with your peer learners, share projects, and swap advice? Join our AI community: 
https://community.deeplearning.ai/invites/VVGtXQuWNR

To learn more about us and signup for future events:
https://www.deeplearning.ai/events/
